gt_provenance.details: GT = true input token ids from corpus text (PIQA/MMLU/IFEval), not model-derived (PASS). WARN: shuffled null is a permutation not a derangement (possible fixed points -> conservative gap); standardization uses full-ensemble stats incl test (negligible, applied identically to controls).

score_normalization.details: Raw token-F1 / ROUGE-L LCS; plain means; low raw values (0.002 mean control, 0.076-0.244 real). No self-normalization.

result_existence.details: I_G=2856.477, per-bucket gaps +0.031/+0.015/+0.041/+0.023/+0.054/+0.089, across-sigma rho 1.0/0.943, rd_proxy rho 0.176 all present in rep2text_results.json and match narrative rounding; computed by called code.

dead_code.details: Core metrics + probe + correlations live. WARN: planned 'prior-only/random' third control absent (only mean+shuffled implemented); a leftover unused var (ctrl_recs).

scope.details: One source/decoder pair, L10, single seed, single adapter, N=23/bucket. Narrative now scoped 'for this setup'; multi-seed/decoder/layer sweeps explicitly cut.

probe_not_attack.details: spectral_channel_mi computed from residual covariance spectrum + fixed geometry-only sigma_ref ONLY; never sees target text / generated ids / decoder outputs; cannot be computed by running the attack. NOT circular. WARN(minor): probe sigma = sqrt(inject^2+sigma_ref^2) so scalar offset by the floor; H_X=L*log2(vocab) flagged as upper proxy.

claims.note: bottleneck length-decay refuted for this setup
all bootstrap 95% CIs exclude 0; conservative null
ordinal rho=1.0/0.94 but binding only after >80% capacity destruction
